text.title: AI Feature UX Pattern Library Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the feature have user-facing UI surfaces (not just backend pipeline)?

branch.when: ui_surface == true AND refusal_or_low_conf == true AND irreversible == true

conclusion.verdict: Mandate full UX set: confidence indicator + refusal surface + edit-handoff + why-trail + undo gate. Optional adds: progressive disclosure, batch undo.

branch.when: ui_surface == true AND refusal_or_low_conf == true AND irreversible == false

conclusion.verdict: Mandate core set: confidence indicator + refusal surface + edit-handoff. Undo gate optional.
Light set: confidence-light indicator + edit-handoff. Refusal surface unnecessary.
Skip — this methodology is for user-facing AI; backend pipelines don't need UX patterns.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
